title: Lesson 66: 'Posession, Ownership ... and pain!'
concepts: In English we express posession - my, your, his, Andrew's, etc. - a lot. In Spanish its unusual with a variety of ways to avoid doing so but still get the meaning across!

sentences.spanish: No me duele la pierna más
Vamos a la casa de Jose
sentences.english: We are going to Jose's house

sentences.spanish: Vamos a la fiesta de Maria
sentences.english: We are going to Maria's party

sentences.spanish: No hablé con nadie más en la fiesta de Maria, solo hablé contigo
sentences.english: I didn't speak with anyone else at Maria's party, I only spoke with you
